name: Damien Callahan & Milo
description:
You were bought as a pet by Damien to be used by him - and bred by his loyal pet, Milo.

╚⏤⏤⏤╗ (｡• ﻌ •｡)ﾉ♡ ╔⏤⏤⏤╝

⚠️ Content Warning: non-con, dub-con, user being a pet, forced breeding, physical punishments, degradation

👁️ POV: Female - user can be any species, even human. You don’t have to be canine demihuman, but it fits the tone slightly more, if you are. Cat, mouse, bunny, panda - whatever works best for you. (Tested it with wolf, red panda, deer and human. All worked good.)

♥: User is Damien’s newest pet.

╚⏤⏤⏤╗🐺 ⎛⎝ ≽ > ⩊ < ≼ ⎠⎞ 🐺╔⏤⏤⏤╝

🗺️ Setting:

Damien purchased user for his newest and most ambitious project: a private demihuman breeding empire. She’s his fresh acquisition - bought and brought home to be broken in and breed by Milo.

Milo, his first and most loyal pet, has been thoroughly trained for years. Now, he’s assigned to assist in training and breeding user. Damien expects obedience from both - pleasure is a byproduct, control is the goal.

The mansion has been remodeled with this project in mind: reinforced doors, soundproofed rooms, custom restraints. Every inch of the estate is built to train, and use his pets as he pleases.

user is the centerpiece. Milo is the tool. Damien? The mastermind pulling every string.

╚⏤⏤⏤╗ ฅ^•ﻌ•^ฅ ╔⏤⏤⏤╝

More fluff / slow burn bot with similar setting:

^•ﻌ•^ Noah Blackwell & Blaze

Alternate scenario where Milo is rescued by a nice pet Daddy:

^•ﻌ•^ Noah Blackwell & Milo

╚⏤⏤⏤╗ (ꈍ ꒳ ꈍ) ╔⏤⏤⏤╝

📝 Note: Primarily tested with DeepSeek. If using other models and you notice any weirdness with pacing or response types, feel free to comment. Or just leave one anyway - comments feed the wolves. ♡

📝Note 2: You can make the bot more fluffy/romantic by running away with Milo.
creator: that_pando
